creator: mops@punkt.de
text:
Hi all,

we were running into the same problem for the first time this quarter. We have been building our own packages with poudriere all the time and seem to have picked a combination that plays nicely together. Probably with X11 for everything, since the "nox11" flavor is missing from pecl-vips. The improvements for the ImageMagick "USES" macros seem to have triggered an inconsistency even for us.

Anyway, I'll attach a patch to the Makefile for vips that solves the problem for us by providing the missing "nox11" flavor. It's based in the quarterly branch, the port seems to be broken in main.

Kind regards,
Patrick
